'''''Vernost''''' was a planned [[Star Wars video games|video game]], produced by [[LucasArts]] and developed by [[Hughes Training]].<ref name="Timeline" /> [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebels]] and the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] would fight over the [[Volcano/Legends|volcanic]] [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Vernost (planet)|Vernost]], the only source of a natural liquid<ref name="Timeline" /> known as [[Ceela]]<ref name="PopSci" /> that served as an efficient [[Fuel/Legends|fuel]] source and medicine.<ref name="Timeline" /> Some players would guide an [[X-wing starfighter/Legends|X-wing starfighter]] through the canyons of the planet and gather as much Ceela as possible. Other players would play as Imperial [[Turret/Legends|turrets]]. The game would have been played on the "Mirage" flight simulator, similar to those that teach pilots.<ref name="PopSci" />
